description: This video discusses section 23.2 of Algorithms Illuminated Part 4, focusing on decision, search, and optimization problems in computational complexity.
topic_summary: The video categorizes computational problems into three types: decision problems, which yield binary answers [t=42.36]; search problems, which provide feasible solutions or report their absence [t=115.48]; and optimization problems, which return the best feasible solution based on an objective function [t=169.81]. It emphasizes the importance of search problems in practical applications and the relationship between optimization and search versions of problems [t=428.32].
